title: Sweetcorn Fritters
summary: Transform tinned sweetcorn into a delicious breakfast with these herby chickpea flour fritters. They’re packed with plants and high in protein and fibre to give you a good start to your day.

method.description: Add the drained sweetcorn, spring onions, red chilli and fresh coriander and parsley to a blender and blitz until combined but still chunky. Add ⅓ egg and blitz again to combine.

Add the chickpea flour and a pinch of salt and blitz again to a thick batter. Use a spoon to stir through ½ the Daily 30+ (if using). If the batter is too thin, add 1 tbsp of chickpea flour at a time until thickened.

Heat a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil in a large frying pan over a medium heat. Add a couple tbsp of the sweetcorn mixture to the pan and cook for 2 mins on each side until golden and cooked through. Repeat for the remaining batter, cooking 2-3 fritters at a time.
While the fritters are cooking, poach your eggs in boiling water to your liking (4 mins for runny yolks). Slice the avocado and halve the cherry tomatoes.
To serve, stack the fritters and top with a tablespoon of Greek yoghurt and a poached egg. Serve with the sliced avocado and cherry tomatoes and an additional sprinkle of Daily 30+ (if using).

chefs.name: Healthy by ZOE
chefs.summary: ZOE (@ZOE) is a science and nutrition company leading a movement to transform the health of millions through smarter food choices. ZOE means life in Greek — and ZOE passionately believes everyone can feel better and live longer, healthier lives by rethinking what they eat. ZOE conducts the world’s largest nutrition science study to better understand the relationship between food and health. Based on this research, their personalised nutrition program delivers tailored advice based on metabolic and gut health, turning complex science into clear step-by-step actions to improve your health with every meal. Become a member at zoe.com. All of their recipes are developed by nutritionists to help you embrace food that tastes amazing and makes you feel even better.
